allow: PowerShell(docker rm -f cats-rsvp-test 2>$null; docker run -d --name cats-rsvp-test -p 18080:80 cats-rsvp:latest; Start-Sleep 2; \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri http://127.0.0.1:18080/ -UseBasicParsing\).StatusCode; \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri http://127.0.0.1:18080/styles.css -UseBasicParsing\).StatusCode; \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri http://127.0.0.1:18080/script.js -UseBasicParsing\).StatusCode; \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri http://127.0.0.1:18080/assets/invite.png -UseBasicParsing\).StatusCode; docker rm -f cats-rsvp-test | Out-Null)
